MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK's Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To CCP 664.6 is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

ORDER SIGNED.
